feature_title: Plan - API Docs and JSDoc Coverage Remediation

plan.title: Plan - API Docs and JSDoc Coverage Remediation
plan.objective: Bring repository API documentation and exported-symbol JSDoc coverage to policy-compliant state so `agent:preflight` and docs verification gates pass cleanly.
in_scope: Discover missing JSDoc and API documentation gaps from canonical verification commands.
A concrete list of missing exported-symbol JSDoc and API docs drift targets.
Update source files with missing JSDoc and API endpoint docs.
Documented exported symbols and route/API docs aligned to current behavior.
Regenerate documentation artifacts and verify policy gates.
Passing docs verification and preflight command outputs.
out_of_scope: No functional refactors, behavior changes, or broad architecture updates beyond what is required to add accurate documentation and regenerate coverage artifacts.

tasks.summary: Collect precise JSDoc and API docs failures from verification commands.
acceptance_criteria: A concrete list of failing symbols/endpoints is recorded from command output.
tasks.outcome: Completed: Collect precise JSDoc and API docs failures from verification commands.

tasks.summary: Add missing JSDoc and API endpoint docs in impacted source files.
acceptance_criteria: All listed missing documentation items are addressed in source.
tasks.outcome: Completed: Add missing JSDoc and API endpoint docs in impacted source files.

tasks.summary: Regenerate coverage artifacts and rerun documentation gates.
acceptance_criteria: JSDoc and API coverage artifacts are updated to match source state.
Verification commands pass.
tasks.outcome: Completed: Regenerate coverage artifacts and rerun documentation gates.

tasks.summary: Run final preflight and summarize documentation remediation outputs.
acceptance_criteria: Preflight passes and final response includes commands run and results.
tasks.outcome: Completed: Run final preflight and summarize documentation remediation outputs.

source_plan.feature_title: Plan - API Docs and JSDoc Coverage Remediation

pre_spec_outline.purpose_goals: Bring repository API documentation and exported-symbol JSDoc coverage to policy-compliant state so `agent:preflight` and docs verification gates pass cleanly.
pre_spec_outline.non_goals: No functional refactors, behavior changes, or broad architecture updates beyond what is required to add accurate documentation and regenerate coverage artifacts.

spec_outline.summary: Identify all current JSDoc and API documentation drift, document missing symbols/endpoints at source files, regenerate coverage artifacts, and verify policy gates are clean.

full_spec_outline.objective: Discover missing JSDoc and API documentation gaps from canonical verification commands.
full_spec_outline.deliverable: A concrete list of missing exported-symbol JSDoc and API docs drift targets.
acceptance_criteria: JSDoc and API verification outputs are captured and actionable.

full_spec_outline.objective: Update source files with missing JSDoc and API endpoint docs.
full_spec_outline.deliverable: Documented exported symbols and route/API docs aligned to current behavior.
acceptance_criteria: All newly documented items are accurate and type-consistent.

full_spec_outline.objective: Regenerate documentation artifacts and verify policy gates.
full_spec_outline.deliverable: Passing docs verification and preflight command outputs.
acceptance_criteria: `npm run jsdoc-coverage:verify` succeeds.
Relevant API coverage verification commands succeed.
`npm run agent:preflight` succeeds.

refined_spec.summary: Use verification-driven edits only: fix documentation at the exact failing symbols/endpoints, regenerate canonical coverage files, and avoid unrelated source modifications.

full_refined_spec.decision: Use repository verification commands as the authoritative gap detector.
full_refined_spec.rationale: Policy gates already encode required documentation standards and prevent drift from manual guesswork.
acceptance_criteria: Every implemented doc change traces back to a failing verification signal.

full_refined_spec.decision: Limit changes to documentation and generated coverage artifacts only.
full_refined_spec.rationale: The user asked to bring documentation up to speed; behavioral code changes increase regression risk and are not required.
acceptance_criteria: No unrelated runtime behavior changes are introduced.

full_refined_spec.decision: Treat clean verification outputs as completion criteria.
full_refined_spec.rationale: Passing verification and preflight provides objective evidence that repository documentation requirements are met.
acceptance_criteria: JSDoc verification passes.
API/OpenAPI coverage verification passes.
Preflight passes after regeneration.

implementation_plan.summary: Work in small batches: detect gaps, patch docs at source, regenerate artifacts, and rerun checks until all documentation gates are green.
